scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) with non-empty HTML and non-null baseUri invokes treeBuilder.parse and returns Document
scenarios.precondition:
Use FakeTreeBuilder stub where parse(input, uri, parser) returns a sentinel Document instance; html = "

text

", baseUri = "http://example.com"
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the sentinel instance from FakeTreeBuilder.parse
pseudocode:
Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); String html = "

text

"; String baseUri = "http://example.com";

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) with empty HTML string and non-null baseUri returns Document
scenarios.precondition: Use FakeTreeBuilder stub where parse(input, uri, parser) returns sentinel Document; html = ""; baseUri = "http://example.com"
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the sentinel instance from FakeTreeBuilder.parse
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); String html = ""; String baseUri = "http://example.com";

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) with null html throws NullPointerException
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); String html = null; String baseUri = "http://example.com";

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) with null baseUri throws NullPointerException
scenarios.precondition: Use FakeTreeBuilder stub; html = "<div/>"; baseUri = null
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); String html = "<div/>"; String baseUri = null;

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) with Reader containing non-empty content and non-null baseUri returns Document
scenarios.precondition: Use FakeTreeBuilder stub where parse(reader, uri, parser) returns sentinel Document; reader = new StringReader("hi"); baseUri = "http://x"
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the sentinel instance from FakeTreeBuilder.parse
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); Reader reader = new StringReader("hi"); String baseUri = "http://x";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) with Reader containing empty content returns Document
scenarios.precondition: Use FakeTreeBuilder stub; reader = new StringReader(""); baseUri = "base"
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the sentinel instance from FakeTreeBuilder.parse
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); Reader reader = new StringReader(""); String baseUri = "base";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) with null Reader throws NullPointerException
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); Reader reader = null; String baseUri = "uri";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) with null baseUri throws NullPointerException
scenarios.precondition: Use FakeTreeBuilder stub; reader = new StringReader("x"); baseUri = null
pseudocode: Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); Reader reader = new StringReader("x"); String baseUri = null;

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) propagates exception thrown by treeBuilder.parse
scenarios.precondition: Use FakeTreeBuilder stub set to throw IllegalStateException("parse failed") on parse; html = "<a>"; baseUri = "u"
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IllegalStateException with message "parse failed"; no state mutated
pseudocode: FakeTreeBuilder stub throws IllegalStateException("parse failed") when parse called; Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); String html = "<a>"; String baseUri = "u";

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) propagates exception thrown by treeBuilder.parse
scenarios.precondition: Use FakeTreeBuilder stub set to throw IllegalArgumentException("err") on parse; reader = new StringReader("<b>"); baseUri = "u"
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IllegalArgumentException with message "err"; no state mutated
pseudocode: FakeTreeBuilder stub throws IllegalArgumentException("err") when parse called; Parser parser = new Parser(fakeTreeBuilder); Reader reader = new StringReader("<b>"); String baseUri = "u";
